evals.prompt: Run /create-spec with this feature description: We need a customer support inbox for our B2B SaaS. Agents should see all incoming emails, assign tickets to themselves, set status (open/pending/resolved), add internal notes, and reply to customers from the same view. We also need SLA tracking with alerts before breach, but only for enterprise accounts. Keep v1 web-only.
evals.expected_output: Creates a complete spec and requirements checklist under .agents/scratchpad with clear scenarios, testable requirements, measurable success criteria, assumptions, and no implementation leakage.
expectations: Spec contains all mandatory sections: User Scenarios & Testing, Requirements, Success Criteria, Assumptions
Spec has at least 8 functional requirements
Spec has at least 3 measurable success criteria
Checklist exists and has no unchecked items

evals.prompt: Run /create-spec with this feature description: Add recurring invoices to our billing workflow. Finance admins should create monthly invoices from subscription records, review generated draft invoices, and send them in batch. If customer tax data is missing, invoice send must be blocked with clear guidance. We sell in US and EU and need configurable tax rules by region.
evals.expected_output: Produces a spec that captures multi-actor billing flow, edge cases around missing tax data, and measurable business/user outcomes.
expectations: Spec contains all mandatory sections: User Scenarios & Testing, Requirements, Success Criteria, Assumptions
Spec has at least 8 functional requirements
Spec has at least 3 measurable success criteria
Checklist exists and has no unchecked items

evals.prompt: Run /create-spec with this feature description: Build a shared release calendar where PMs can create launch entries, mark confidence level, and attach dependencies. Engineering managers need a weekly view filtered by team. We are not sure whether non-PM roles should edit entries or comment only.
evals.expected_output: Produces a spec and checklist; if needed, asks high-impact clarification(s) using the mandated options table format.
expectations: Spec contains all mandatory sections: User Scenarios & Testing, Requirements, Success Criteria, Assumptions
Spec has at least 8 functional requirements
Spec has at least 3 measurable success criteria
Checklist exists and has no unchecked items
